scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix doctor-frontend && npm install --prefix patient-frontend && npm install --prefix companion-app
scripts.build:frontend: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix doctor-frontend && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const files=['patient.html','signup.html','login.html','auth.js','auth.css','app.js','styles.css','config.js','doctor-launch.html','meiosis-setup.html','scan.html','icon.svg','manifest.webmanifest','sw.js']; files.forEach(f=>{ if(fs.existsSync(f)) fs.copyFileSync(f, path.join('doctor-frontend/dist', f)) })"
